nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: A cinematic extreme close-up shot frames a serene spring scene where soft, diffused sunlight filters through a canopy of blooming cherry blossoms, creating a creamy bokeh of pale pink and white in both the foreground and background. A young Asian woman lies with her head tilted far back across the frame, featuring dark hair with fine bangs and delicate, smooth skin. She keeps her lips softly parted and maintains a steady, unblinking gaze directed upward toward the overhanging branches. Initially, a single, delicate cherry blossom petal rests gently on the bridge of her nose before a sudden, unseen breeze dislodges it, causing the petal to slowly flutter down across her cheek and drift out of view. The camera executes a very slow, creeping pan to the right, utilizing a razor-thin depth of field to keep the sharp focus locked onto the intricate details of her dark eyes and the falling petal while the floral surroundings melt away. The tranquil atmosphere is underscored by the gentle, ambient rustling of branches and the soft sweep of wind

widgets_values: pc game, console game, video game, cartoon, childish, ugly
